title: Samsung Electronics Q1 net surges over fivefold on AI
description: Samsung Electronics Co. said Thursday its first-quarter net profit surged more than fivefold from a year earlier, driven by robust demand for high-end memory chips used in artificial intelligence (AI) applications.
content:

title: SCG, Huawei and Conch sign MoU on industrial AI
description: Huawei Technologies (Thailand) Co, Ltd announces a landmark tripartite collaboration with The Siam Cement Public Company Limited (SCG) , a leading integrated cement and building materials company in Asean, and Anhui Conch Information Technology Engineering Co, Ltd (Conch) , a specialist in Advanced Process Control (APC) systems and AI-driven industrial optimisation, to jointly develop and deploy an integrated APC and Artificial Intelligence solution underpinned by modern ICT infrastructure, tailored to SCG's cement manufacturing operations.

title: Italy closes antitrust probes into AI firms after commitments on 'hallucination' risks

title: What entry level jobs are safe from AI? Here are 12 that pay well

title: How A.I. Killed Student Writing (and Revived It)
description: High school and college teachers are watching students write, in the classroom, in order to protect against the incursion of artificial intelligence.
content:

title: Artificial Intelligence Cannot Replace a Human Being: Arjun Ram Meghwal at JGU Book Launch on Technology Law
description: New Delhi [India], April 30: 'Innovation, Technology or Artificial Intelligence cannot replace a human being. AI poses many challenges, and we have become exceedingly technologically advanced, but it cannot replace a person,' said Shri Arjun Ram Meghwal, Hon'ble Minister of State for Law & Justice (IC), Government of India at the Launch of the book, Technology Law: Regulations, Cyber Policy, and the Digital Landscape authored by Rodney D. Ryder & Nikhil Naren.
